tool_args.label: West Hempstead Branch – Concrete Tie and Rail Replacement
tool_args.raw_text: West Hempstead Branch – Concrete Tie and Rail Replacement – On the weekends of October 4-5, October 18-19, and October 25-26, one of two main tracks on the Montauk Branch between Jamaica and Rockville Centre and also the single main track on the West Hempstead Branch will be out of service to support a series of concrete tie and rail replacements in the vicinity of Valley Stream and on the West Hempstead Branch.

payload.project_name: West Hempstead Branch – Concrete Tie and Rail Replacement
payload.description: Concrete tie and rail replacement on the West Hempstead Branch and Montauk Branch between Jamaica and Rockville Centre, vicinity of Valley Stream

tool_args.label: Ronkonkoma Branch – Switch Installations
tool_args.raw_text: Ronkonkoma Branch – Switch Installations – On the weekends of October 4-5, October 18-19, and October 25-26, one of two station tracks in Ronkonkoma will be out of service while new switches are installed and additional state of good repair infrastructure maintenance is performed to improve operational flexibility and reliability.

payload.description: New switch installations and state of good repair maintenance at Ronkonkoma Station

tool_args.label: Benefits of new concrete ties
tool_args.raw_text: Installing the new concrete ties on the West Hempstead Branch will result in a smoother ride for customers, offer greater reliability versus traditional wooden ties and provide a longer lifespan, thus reducing the need for future outages.

payload.claim_text: Installing the new concrete ties on the West Hempstead Branch will result in a smoother ride for customers, offer greater reliability versus traditional wooden ties and provide a longer lifespan, thus reducing the need for future outages.
payload.description: Benefits of new concrete ties over traditional wooden ties on the West Hempstead Branch
payload.subject: West Hempstead Branch concrete tie replacement

tool_args.label: West Hempstead trackwork temporary service adjustments
tool_args.raw_text: With one of two main tracks out of service on the Montauk Branch between Jamaica and Rockville Centre, service will be reduced to hourly in both directions between Penn Station and Babylon for the majority of these 48-hour weekends. Limited semi-express service will operate from Penn Station to connect with Patchogue and Speonk diesel service in Babylon. Additionally, bus service will replace train service on the West Hempstead Branch between Valley Stream and West Hempstead for a period of 48 hours.

payload.claim_text: With one of two main tracks out of service on the Montauk Branch between Jamaica and Rockville Centre, service will be reduced to hourly in both directions between Penn Station and Babylon for the majority of these 48-hour weekends. Limited semi-express service will operate from Penn Station to connect with Patchogue and Speonk diesel service in Babylon. Additionally, bus service will replace train service on the West Hempstead Branch between Valley Stream and West Hempstead for a period of 48 hours.
payload.subject: West Hempstead Branch/Montauk Branch temporary service adjustments

tool_args.label: Ronkonkoma trackwork temporary service adjustments
tool_args.raw_text: With one of two station tracks out of service in Ronkonkoma, service will be reduced to hourly at Wyandanch, Deer Park, Brentwood, Central Islip and Ronkonkoma, with buses replacing all train service east of Ronkonkoma. Train service will remain at half hourly intervals to/from Farmingdale Station.

payload.claim_text: With one of two station tracks out of service in Ronkonkoma, service will be reduced to hourly at Wyandanch, Deer Park, Brentwood, Central Islip and Ronkonkoma, with buses replacing all train service east of Ronkonkoma. Train service will remain at half hourly intervals to/from Farmingdale Station.
payload.subject: Ronkonkoma Branch temporary service adjustments
